name: Lnchee Kabin (Malaysian Spiced Fried Chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and dry chicken thoroughly with paper towels.
2. Using a hair drier on the coolest setting, dry the outside of the chicken.
3. Chop chicken into small, casserole-size pieces.
4. Blend marinade ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
5. Toss chicken pieces in marinade to ensure they are well coated.
6. Marinate for 3 to 4 hours.
7. Make sauce by blending mustard with Worcestershire sauce to form a smooth paste, then stir in remaining Worcestershire sauce and finely sliced chillies. Set aside.
8. Just before cooking, drain off excess marinade.
9. Deep-fry chicken in batches in very hot oil (190°C).
10. Drain fried chicken on paper towels on a rack.
11. Once all the chicken is fried, place on a serving dish and garnish with prawn crackers.
12. Serve hot with accompanying sauce in a separate bowl.
